name: apres

metadata.name: apres
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v2 or later (GPLv2+)
metadata.summary: External bindings for apres MIDI library

documentation:
# Apres bindings Python bindings for the Apres MIDI library
[![PyPI - Downloads](https://img.shields.io/pypi/dw/apres?style=flat-square)](https://pypi.org/project/apres/) [![PyPI](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/apres?style=flat-square)](https://pypi.org/project/apres/) [![License](https://img.shields.io/pypi/l/apres?style=flat-square)](https://burnsomni.net/project/apres_bindings/?branch=master&path=LICENSE) ## Installation Can be installed through pip ``` pip install apres ``` ## Usage Examples Load a Song ```python from apres import MIDI midi = MIDI("/path/to/file.mid") ``` Create a new MIDI ```python from apres import MIDI midi = MIDI() ``` Creating a song ```python from apres import MIDI, NoteOnEvent, NoteOffEvent # Create an empty MIDI file. midi = MIDI() # Press midi note 64 (Middle E) on the first track (0) at the first position (0 ticks) midi.add_event(NoteOnEvent(channel=0, note=64, velocity=100), tick=0, track=0) # Release midi note 64 (Middle E) on the first track (0) one beat later (120 ticks) midi.add_event(NoteOffEvent(channel=0, note=64), wait=120, track=0) # Save it to a file midi.save("beep.mid") ```

modules.name: apres
documentation: Mutable Midi Library

functions.name: apres.to_variable_length
documentation: Convert a number to midi's variable-length format

classes.name: apres.EventNotFound
documentation: Raised when an event id is given that doesn't belong to any known event

classes.name: apres.TrackOutOfBounds
documentation: Raised when trying to add event to track > 15

classes.name: apres.AlreadyInMIDI
documentation:
Raised when attempting to add an event
to a midi that already has the associated id

classes.name: apres.NoMIDI
documentation:
Raised when attempting to call a function that requires a
MIDI object be associated with the event, but is not

classes.name: apres.InvalidMIDIFile
documentation: Raised when reading an unrecognizeable file

documentation: Load a MIDI file

documentation: Save a MIDI file

documentation: Get sorted list of events in midi events

documentation: Get all events in midi, grouped by track

methods.name: apres.MIDI.add_event
documentation: Add Midi Event to the Midi

methods.name: apres.MIDI.track_get_length
documentation: Get number of ticks in a track

methods.name: apres.MIDI.insert_event
documentation: Put a MIDIEvent at a specific position in the piece

methods.name: apres.MIDI.place_event
documentation: Deprecated. use insert_event() instead
Usable object. Converted from midi files.

methods.name: apres.MIDIController.close

documentation: Listen to the midi device for incoming bits. Process them and call their hooks.

Read Input from Midi Device
